calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mandatory Settlement Conference in Dept. 218.
Appearances: Dennis Hyde, Esq. for Plaintiff; Scot Free defendant In Pro Per.
Matter assigned to Will Chen, Judge Pro Tem, for settlement conference. The parties reach settlement, which is read into record:
Defendant Scot Free is to surrender possession of the premises located at 3465 25th Street, Apartment 19, San Francisco, California by 5:00pm on Oct-01-2004. Past rent of $1600 is to be paid by defendant Free to Plaintiff in three installments, payable by cash, cashier's check or money order as follows: $1000 due Aug-27-2004, $300 due Sep-15-2004 and $300 due Sep-27-2004; all such payments to be made to plaintiff at the offices of Murphy Investments located at 1355 Valencia Street, San Francisco, California between the hours of 9:00am-5:00pm.
If these three payments are each made timely, Plaintiff shall dismiss the action as to defendant Free. In the event of any failure by defendant to timely make payment, Defendant Free shall be laible for all back rent.
Defendant Free agrees to withdraw his pending Rent Board petition.
Both parties acknowledge on the record their understanding of and agreement to the terms of the settlement. The trial date is ordered vacated.
Judge Pro Tem: Will Chen; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Patty Lee Hubble (D. 218)
